title: tournefortia subtropica
intro: Tournefortia subtropica, also known as the False Borage or Tournefortia, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal compounds. The plant's leaves, stems, and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Tournefortia subtropica include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
